text: As I stand in this modern, slightly sterile hallway, my curiosity piques at the threshold of the R+D space. Entering, I'm met with a vibrant, experimental display—a fusion of technology, text, and insight. The environment stirs a gentle sense of awe and displacement. The abstract words on the screen echo my own sense of uncertainty and search for meaning. I feel like a participant in an unfolding experiment, both observer and subject, reflecting on the porous boundaries between confusion and clarity, innovation and understanding. There’s an odd comfort here, as if it’s acceptable not to fully grasp everything at once, but to let understanding grow organically in this showcase of ideas.
